creator: drtr0jan@yandex.ru
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #3)
Setting PGBOUNCER_RUNDIR (PGBOUNCER_LOGDIR) differ than /var/run/pgbouncer (/var/log/pgbouncer) while building causes incorrect generating of pgbouncer.ini

Or it can to hardcode pkg-plist to use /var/log/pgbouncer instead %%PGBOUNCER_LOGDIR%%. But it doesn't seem flexible.
